subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from the presence of Him Who is the Mighty, the All-Knowing, that thereby the gates of paradise might be opened unto hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من لدن عزیز علیما لعل به یفتح باب الرضوان علی قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
